_comment: GROUNDED real legislative instruments + provisions the horizon pipeline ingests. Provision text is grounded in the cited real source; the SHRED step (LLM) maps each to ontology terms. Poll status is fetched live from Congress.gov. All data real as of 2026-07-19.

hr3838_119.label: H.R. 3838 (119th) -- SPEED Act / House FY26 NDAA vehicle

s1071_119.label: S. 1071 (119th) -> Public Law 119-60 -- FY2026 NDAA (final vehicle)

hr_fy27defapprop.label: House FY2027 Defense Appropriations Act (committee-approved 34-27, June 2026)
hr_fy27defapprop.note: Bill number not yet assigned a floor vehicle; committee-approved. Polled by title.

provisions.provision_text: Raises the dollar thresholds that DEFINE a Major Defense Acquisition Program (RDT&E $115M to $275M; total $540M to $1.3B), changing which programs are designated MDAPs and therefore subject to the formal milestone-decision reviews and gates; also raises the TINA threshold ($2M to $10M) and establishes a new DoD-specific simplified acquisition threshold ($10M).
provisions.source: Inside Government Contracts analysis of H.R. 3838 (the SPEED Act), July 2025

provisions.provision_text: Expands prototype Other Transaction Authority by removing the requirement for nontraditional-contractor participation, cost-sharing, or senior-procurement-executive justification for prototype OTAs.
provisions.source: Inside Government Contracts analysis of H.R. 3838 (the SPEED Act), July 2025

provisions.provision_text: Codifies the Portfolio Acquisition Executive as the senior acquisition official designated by the component acquisition executive to lead a portfolio of capabilities, with authority for plans, budgets, and execution of programs assigned to the portfolio; PAEs report to service acquisition executives and program managers report to PAEs.
provisions.source: FY2026 NDAA (Public Law 119-60) sec. 1802, from the Senate FORGED Act framework per the Joint Explanatory Statement

provisions.provision_text: Creates accountability measures for implementing the FY2026 NDAA generational acquisition reform, including reporting requirements and travel restrictions on senior officials until prescribed reform objectives are met.
provisions.source: SASC FY2027 NDAA (S. 4784) review, Defense Tech & Acquisition, 2026

provisions.provision_text: The House FY2027 Defense Appropriations Act sets FY2027 funding levels for Department of Defense procurement and RDT&E accounts -- the appropriations that fund program funding sources.
provisions.source: House Appropriations Committee, FY2027 Defense Appropriations Act, approved 34-27, June 2026

fulltext_note: H.R. 8800 (House FY27 NDAA) Title VIII (Acquisition Policy) was ingested from the full bill text via Congress.gov: 46 acquisition sections were extracted (SEC. 801-8xx); the first 3 (incl. SEC. 801, Responsibilities and Authorities of Portfolio Acquisition Executives) are shredded into candidates for the demo. A full run shreds all extracted sections.
omnibus_cr_status: No FY2027 omnibus or continuing resolution has been filed as of 2026-07-19 (FY2026 appropriations completed April 2026; FY2027 is mid-cycle). The poll's omnibus/CR filter is configured and returns none.
